desc.es: Baja a la mitad su Ataque y su Velocidad durante cinco turnos.

shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack and Speed are halved for 5 turns.

desc.en: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in snow.
desc.es: Aumenta su Velocidad si está granizando.

shortDesc: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

desc.en: If the Pokémon's attack lands a critical hit, the attack is powered up even further.
desc.es: Potencia los golpes críticos que asesta aún más de lo normal.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon strikes with a critical hit, the damage is multiplied by 1.5.

desc.en: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in snow.
desc.es: Sube la Evasión cuando graniza.

shortDesc: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x.

desc.en: The Pokémon makes it snow when it enters a battle.
desc.es: Invoca una tormenta de granizo al entrar en combate.

shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Snow.

desc.en: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted, but its HP decreases every turn.
desc.es: Si hace sol, aumenta su Ataque Especial, pero pierde PS en cada turno.

shortDesc: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x; loses 1/8 max HP per turn.

desc.en: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokémon.
desc.es: Mitiga el daño que le infligen los movimientos supereficaces.

shortDesc: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

desc.en: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat every time another Pokémon faints.
desc.es: Aumenta su Ataque Especial cada vez que un Pokémon cae debilitado.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Special Attack is raised by 1 stage when another Pokemon faints.

desc.en: Soundproofing gives the Pokémon full immunity to all sound-based moves.
desc.es: Su aislamiento acústico lo protege de movimientos que usan sonido.

shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to sound-based moves, unless it used the move.

desc.en: The Pokémon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.
desc.es: Aumenta su Velocidad en cada turno.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Speed is raised 1 stage at the end of each full turn on the field.

desc.en: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the attacker becomes burned.

desc.en: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.
desc.es: Si el objetivo de su ataque es sustituido por otro, duplica el daño que infligirá.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's offensive stat is doubled against a target that switched in this turn.

desc.en: The Pokémon is always the last to use its moves.
desc.es: Ejecuta su movimiento tras todos los demás.

shortDesc: This Pokemon moves last among Pokemon using the same or greater priority moves.

desc.en: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
desc.es: Impide que el rival pueda atraer ataques hacia sí mismo por efecto de su habilidad o sus movimientos.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.

desc.en: Boosts the Defense stat when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.
desc.es: Aumenta su Defensa al recibir un ataque.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Defense is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a move.

desc.en: The Pokémon changes its form to Blade Forme when it uses an attack move and changes to Shield Forme when it uses King’s Shield.
desc.es: Adopta la Forma Filo al lanzar un ataque, o bien la Forma Escudo si usa el movimiento Escudo Real.

shortDesc: If Aegislash, changes Forme to Blade before attacks and Shield before King's Shield.

desc.en: The Pokémon is charged with static electricity and may paralyze attackers that make direct contact with it.
desc.es: La electricidad estática que lo envuelve puede paralizar al mínimo contacto.

shortDesc: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be paralyzed.

desc.en: The Pokémon's determination boosts its Speed stat every time it flinches.
desc.es: Cada vez que se amedrenta sube su Velocidad, debido a su voluntad inquebrantable.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon flinches, its Speed is raised by 1 stage.

desc.en: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.
desc.es: Si le alcanza un movimiento de tipo Fuego o Agua, le sube muchísimo la Velocidad.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Speed is raised by 6 stages after it is damaged by Fire/Water moves.

desc.en: Powers up Steel-type moves.
desc.es: Potencia los movimientos de tipo Acero.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Steel-type attack.

desc.en: Powers up the Steel-type moves of the Pokémon and its allies.
desc.es: Potencia los movimientos de tipo Acero de los aliados.

shortDesc: This Pokemon and its allies' Steel-type moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

desc.en: By releasing a stench when attacking, the Pokémon may cause the target to flinch.
desc.es: Puede amedrentar al rival al atacarlo debido al mal olor que emana.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks without a chance to flinch gain a 10% chance to flinch.

desc.en: The Pokémon's held items cling to its sticky body and cannot be removed by other Pokémon.
desc.es: Los objetos se quedan pegados a su cuerpo, por lo que no pueden robárselos.

shortDesc: This Pokemon cannot lose its held item due to another Pokemon's Ability or attack.

desc.en: The Pokémon draws in all Water-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted.
desc.es: Atrae y neutraliza los movimientos de tipo Agua, que además le suben el Ataque Especial.

shortDesc: This Pokemon draws Water moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Water immunity.

desc.en: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.
desc.es: Su robusta mandíbula le confiere una mordedura potente.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's bite-based attacks have 1.5x power. Bug Bite is not boosted.

desc.en: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.
desc.es: Evita que el rival pueda debilitarlo de un solo golpe cuando tiene los PS al máximo. También evita los movimientos fulminantes.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. Immune to OHKO.

desc.en: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.
desc.es: Sus ventosas se aferran al suelo, con lo cual anula movimientos y objetos que fuerzan el relevo.

shortDesc: This Pokemon cannot be forced to switch out by another Pokemon's attack or item.

desc.en: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted.
desc.es: Su buena suerte aumenta la probabilidad de asestar golpes críticos.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's critical hit ratio is raised by 1 stage.

desc.en: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the evasiveness of opponents 1 stage. Once per battle.

desc.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves have 10% more power for each fainted ally, up to 5 allies.

desc.en: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat on Electric Terrain.
desc.es: Duplica su Velocidad si hay un campo eléctrico en el terreno de combate.

shortDesc: If Electric Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

desc.en: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
desc.es: Potencia sus movimientos de tipo Bicho cuando le quedan pocos PS.

shortDesc: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Bug attacks.

desc.en: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from falling asleep.
desc.es: No cae dormido y evita también que sus aliados se duerman.

shortDesc: This Pokemon and its allies cannot fall asleep; those already asleep do not wake up.

desc.en: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.
desc.es: Sube su Velocidad cuando llueve.

shortDesc: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

desc.en: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.

shortDesc: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Defense multiplied by 0.75.

desc.en: The Pokémon passes its held item to an ally that has used up an item.
desc.es: Pasa su objeto a un aliado que ya haya utilizado el suyo.

shortDesc: If an ally uses its item, this Pokemon gives its item to that ally immediately.

desc.en: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.
desc.es: Contagia el envenenamiento, las quemaduras o la parálisis al Pokémon que le cause ese estado.

shortDesc: If another Pokemon burns/poisons/paralyzes this Pokemon, it also gets that status.

desc.en: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.

shortDesc: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Attack multiplied by 0.75.

desc.en: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness if it is confused.
desc.es: Sube su Evasión si está confuso.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's evasiveness is doubled as long as it is confused.

desc.en: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.
desc.es: Baja la Velocidad del rival cuando este le ataca con un movimiento de contacto.

shortDesc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.

desc.en: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.
desc.es: Potencia sus movimientos más débiles.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves of 60 power or less have 1.5x power, including Struggle.

desc.en: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.
desc.es: Elude los ataques de los aliados durante el combate.

shortDesc: This Pokemon does not take damage from attacks made by its allies.

desc.en: When Terapagos changes into its Stellar Form, it uses its hidden powers to eliminate all effects of weather and terrain, reducing them to zero.

shortDesc: Terapagos: Terastallizing ends the effects of weather and terrain. Once per battle.

desc.en: The Pokémon's shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

shortDesc: Terapagos: If full HP, attacks taken have 0.5x effectiveness unless naturally immune.

desc.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon is a Terapagos, it transforms into its Terastal Form on entry.

desc.en: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
desc.es: Las habilidades del objetivo no afectan a los movimientos que emplea.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.

desc.en: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 when damaged by Fire moves; can't be burned.

desc.en: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.
desc.es: Gracias a la gruesa capa de grasa que lo protege, reduce a la mitad el daño que recibe de ataques de tipo Fuego o Hielo.

shortDesc: Fire-/Ice-type moves against this Pokemon deal damage with a halved offensive stat.

desc.en: The Pokémon can use “not very effective” moves to deal regular damage.
desc.es: Potencia los movimientos que no son muy eficaces, que infligen ahora un daño normal.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks that are not very effective on a target deal double damage.

desc.en: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
desc.es: Potencia sus movimientos de tipo Agua cuando le quedan pocos PS.

shortDesc: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Water attacks.

desc.en: Powers up moves that make direct contact.
desc.es: Aumenta la potencia de los movimientos de contacto.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's contact moves have their power multiplied by 1.3.

desc.en: Powers up physical moves when the Pokémon is poisoned.
desc.es: Aumenta la potencia de sus ataques físicos cuando está envenenado.

shortDesc: While this Pokemon is poisoned, its physical attacks have 1.5x power.

desc.en: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks have a 30% chance of badly poisoning.

desc.en: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon is hit by a physical attack, Toxic Spikes are set on the opposing side.

desc.en: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon copies an opposing Pokémon's Ability.
desc.es: Al entrar en combate copia la habilidad del rival.

shortDesc: On switch-in, or when it can, this Pokemon copies a random adjacent foe's Ability.

desc.en: Powers up Electric-type moves.
desc.es: Potencia los movimientos de tipo Eléctrico.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.3 while using an Electric-type attack.

desc.en: Gives priority to the Pokémon's healing moves.
desc.es: Da prioridad a los movimientos que restauran PS.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.

desc.en: Each time the Pokémon uses a move, it spends the next turn loafing around.
desc.es: Al ejecutar un movimiento, descansará en el turno siguiente.

shortDesc: This Pokemon skips every other turn instead of using a move.

desc.en: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
desc.es: Las habilidades del objetivo no afectan a los movimientos que emplea.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.

desc.en: When attacking, the Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes.
desc.es: Pasa por alto las mejoras en las características del rival al atacar.

shortDesc: This Pokemon ignores other Pokemon's stat stages when taking or doing damage.

desc.en: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon's held item is used or lost.
desc.es: Sube su Velocidad si usa o pierde el objeto que lleva.

shortDesc: Speed is doubled on held item loss; boost is lost if it switches, gets new item/Ability.

desc.en: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.
desc.es: Pone nervioso al rival y le impide usar bayas.

shortDesc: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries.

desc.en: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.
desc.es: Si usa un movimiento de contacto, puede infligir daño al objetivo aunque este se proteja.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore the target's protection, except Max Guard.

desc.en: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.

shortDesc: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Special Attack multiplied by 0.75.

desc.en: Boosts the accuracy of its allies and itself.
desc.es: Sube su Precisión y la de sus aliados.

shortDesc: This Pokemon and its allies' moves have their accuracy multiplied by 1.1.

desc.en: The Pokémon is full of vitality, and that prevents it from falling asleep.
desc.es: Su determinación le impide quedarse dormido.

shortDesc: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.

desc.en: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
desc.es: Si le alcanza un movimiento de tipo Eléctrico, recupera PS en vez de sufrir daño.

shortDesc: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Electric moves; Electric immunity.

desc.en: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.
desc.es: Si le alcanza un movimiento de contacto, intercambia su habilidad con la del agresor.

shortDesc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability swapped with this one.

desc.en: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
desc.es: Si le alcanza un movimiento de tipo Agua, recupera PS en vez de sufrir daño.

shortDesc: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Water moves; Water immunity.

desc.en: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves that hit the Pokémon and prevents it from being burned.
desc.es: Reduce el daño que le provocan los movimientos de tipo Fuego y es inmune a las quemaduras.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Water power is 2x; it can't be burned; Fire power against it is halved.

desc.en: Boosts the Defense stat sharply when the Pokémon is hit by a Water-type move.
desc.es: Aumenta mucho su Defensa si le alcanza un movimiento de tipo Agua.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages after it is damaged by a Water-type move.

desc.en: The Pokémon's water veil prevents it from being burned.
desc.es: Evita las quemaduras gracias a la capa de agua que lo envuelve.

shortDesc: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.

desc.en: The Pokémon's Defense stat is lowered when it takes damage from physical moves, but its Speed stat is sharply boosted.
desc.es: Al recibir daño de un ataque físico, le baja la Defensa, pero le sube mucho la Velocidad.

shortDesc: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.

desc.en: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

shortDesc: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages if hit by a Fire move; Fire immunity.

desc.en: The Pokémon is protected by its white smoke, which prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.
desc.es: El humo blanco que lo protege evita que otros Pokémon le bajen las características.

shortDesc: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

desc.en: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.
desc.es: Se asusta y abandona el terreno de combate cuando sus PS se ven reducidos a la mitad.

shortDesc: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.

desc.en: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

shortDesc: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.

desc.en: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.

shortDesc: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.

desc.en: Its mysterious power only lets supereffective moves hit the Pokémon.
desc.es: Gracias a un poder misterioso, solo le hacen daño los movimientos supereficaces.

shortDesc: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.

desc.en: Makes status moves more likely to miss the Pokémon.
desc.es: Presenta una mayor resistencia ante los movimientos de estado.

shortDesc: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.

desc.en: Changes the Pokémon’s shape when HP is half or less.
desc.es: Cambia de forma si sus PS se ven reducidos a la mitad.

shortDesc: If Darmanitan, at end of turn changes Mode to Standard if > 1/2 max HP, else Zen.

desc.en: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

shortDesc: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.
